An '''armored hovertrain''' consisted of connected carriages that ran along a [[Magnet/Legends|magnetic]] field. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] used one of these trains to [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Prison/Legends|prisoners]] and cargo across the [[Spice/Legends|spice]]-mining, irregularly shaped [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. A similar train was later used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to ferry supplies and reinforcements to a [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrilan]] [[Nayli|city]] during [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kohl Seerdon]]'s [[blockade on Chandrila]]. Under the protection of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], the train survived an Imperial attack and reached the city.

There were three discernible carriage types on the train:
*Cockpit (a sloping cuboid), armed with a forward [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser]] emplacement and two turreted laser emplacement (one on each side).
*Cargo carriage (a simple cuboid).
*Gun carriage with two [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] cannons and a missile launcher.

During the [[battle near the Maw]], [[Karie Neth/Legends|Karie Neth]] and a group of fellow prisoners hijacked an armored hovertrain to escape the Maw prison facility with Rogue Squadron's help.

Two armored hovertrains operated from the spaceport in [[Worlport/Legends|Worlport]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] to transport cargo and people to outlying areas. One such train wound its way through the [[Scraplands/Legends|Scraplands]], an enormous wasteland to the north of Worlport.
